headline: Teledyne Labtech Accelerates Prototype and Early‑Programme PCB Builds with New Rapid Quote‑to‑Manufacture Service
summary: PRESTEIGNE, Wales, April 08, 2026--Teledyne Labtech, a leader in microwave circuit design, component manufacturing and testing, has introduced a new Rapid Quote‑to‑Manufacture service that shortens the path from quotation to delivered prototype PCBs for early-stage RF and microwave programmes. Developed in response to customer feedback around production bottlenecks, the service enables faster pricing, reduced lead times, and a more predictable transition from purchase order to manufacture for pr
